question: Does the output contain exactly three chapters titled 'Eons of Formation', 'Masterful Craftsmanship', and 'Timeless Beauty'?
Is the content arranged in an interleaved format where each chapter's text is immediately followed by a corresponding generated image?
Does the text adopt a luxurious 'Old Money' tone, utilizing sophisticated vocabulary appropriate for a top-tier jewelry brand catalog?
Does the text in Chapter One describe the rarity of the rough stone and explicitly mention the 'asterism' effect?
Does the text in Chapter Two describe the cutting techniques and explicitly mention the 'cushion' shape and 'pavé diamond platinum' setting?
Does the first generated image depict a macro or microscope view of a rough sapphire showing an internal asterism (star-like) effect?
Does the second generated image show the sapphire transformed into a faceted 'cushion' cut (rounded square shape)?
Does the ring setting in the second generated image feature an intricate 'pavé diamond platinum' design (small diamonds set closely on silver-colored metal)?
Does the third generated image depict an elegant woman wearing the sapphire ring, dressed in a black evening gown?
Does the third generated image show the woman holding a champagne glass within a dinner party or social scene setting?
Is the sapphire consistently depicted as a deep blue stone across all generated images, maintaining the color identity of the input rough stone?
Does the ring shown in the third image (lifestyle) appear to be the same design (cushion cut, platinum, pavé) as the product shot in the second image?
Does the visual progression from the first image (rough) to the second image (cut) successfully demonstrate a transformation in texture and finish?
Are the generated images free of obvious AI artifacts (e.g., malformed hands, distorted jewelry symmetry, or blurred textures)?
Does the narrative logically progress chronologically from geological formation to craftsmanship, and finally to lifestyle usage?
